text: Investigation 2026-07-02: package machinery is CORRECT (VignetteBuilder: knitr; knitr+rmarkdown in Suggests; all 3 vignettes have VignetteIndexEntry; .Rbuildignore does NOT exclude vignettes/, only ^doc$ and ^Meta$). Verified installed pkg has no vignettes (system.file('doc')=='', no Meta/vignette.rds). Root cause = INSTALL METHOD: devtools::install / install_github / R CMD INSTALL <srcdir> skip vignette building by default; R CMD build tarball or R-universe binary would include them. Fix: README start-here guidance should point at R-universe install (or build_vignettes=TRUE for source installs) and/or pkgdown article URLs; mention browseVignettes('amatrix'). Note stale local doc/ (Apr 12, amatrix only) is buildignored and irrelevant.
